title: Apply blue and green color scheme to entire website

requirements.text: Update the CSS color palette in frontend/src/index.css to use blue and green as the primary color combination, replacing the current vibrant color system (electric-blue, coral-pink, lime-green, sunshine-yellow, vivid-orange) with harmonious blue and green tones

quotes: please use blue and green colour combination for my entire website

acceptanceCriteria: Color palette maintains sufficient contrast for accessibility
Both light and dark mode variants are updated with blue-green theme

requirements.text: Apply the new blue and green color scheme consistently across all components including navigation, cards, buttons, links, hero sections, and interactive elements

quotes: please use blue and green colour combination for my entire website

acceptanceCriteria: All pages reflect the blue and green color theme
Navigation bar uses blue and green colors
Buttons and interactive elements follow the new color scheme
Hero sections and feature cards maintain visual consistency with the theme

constraints: Maintain the existing OKLCH color system structure in index.css
Preserve accessibility standards for color contrast ratios
Do not modify immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Changing the technology stack or framework
Adding new features beyond color scheme changes
